old: 希腊神话里有很多神。
new: 中国神话是一套关于神灵和英雄的故事体系。
reason: Definition is 'mythology' (body of myths as a system), but sentence illustrates a single myth corpus rather than mythology as a discipline; new sentence better illustrates the system sense.

old: There are many gods in Greek myths.
new: Chinese mythology is a system of stories about gods and heroes.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 这是一个古代神话，不是真实的。
new: 希腊神话包含了很多关于神和英雄的故事。
reason: Sentence illustrates a single myth, not mythology as a body; also near-duplicate in sense with row 4336 s3.

old: This is an ancient myth, not real.
new: Greek mythology contains many stories about gods and heroes.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 情况不断升级，变得更严重。
new: 双方的矛盾不断升级，很难解决。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_2 — both describe 'situation escalating and becoming more serious'.

old: The situation keeps escalating and becoming more serious.
new: The conflict between the two sides keeps escalating and is hard to resolve.
reason: Paired translation fix.
True duplicate of row 4348: 'to manufacture' and 'to produce' are the same sense of 生产 — both rows use factory/product sentences with no meaningful distinction.

old: 那里是省会。
new: 成都是四川省的省会。
reason: Tautological and vague — does not teach usage of the word 省会.

old: That place is the provincial capital.
new: Chengdu is the provincial capital of Sichuan.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 中国队在决赛中胜了。
new: 他在象棋比赛中胜了对手。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1 — both describe a team being victorious in a competition.

old: The Chinese team was victorious in the final.
new: He was victorious over his opponent in the chess competition.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 那个时刻让我永远记得。
new: 她盼望着孩子出生的那个时刻。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1 — both use '那个时刻' with the same nostalgic/memorable framing.

old: That moment will stay with me forever.
new: She looked forward to the moment her child would be born.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 学校实施了新的课程改革。
new: 政府实施了新的环保法规。
reason: Cross-row near-duplicate with row 4373 sentence_1 '学校实行了新的考试制度'; both begin with '学校实施/实行了新的...' using a school policy scenario.

old: The school implemented a new curriculum reform.
new: The government implemented new environmental regulations.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 学校实施了新的管理办法。
new: 新的交通规定已经开始实施。
reason: Cross-row near-duplicate with rows 4373 and 4376 — all three use school/company implementing a new policy.

old: The school put the new management measures into effect.
new: The new traffic regulations have started to be put into effect.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 这项计划已经开始实施了。
new: 这项政策从明年起正式实施。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_2 within same row (both: 新计划/这项计划开始实施 — same scenario and structure).

old: This plan has already been put into effect.
new: This policy will be officially put into effect starting next year.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: results
new: rewards
reason: 收获 means the gains/rewards one earns from effort, not 'results' (成果/结果); 'rewards' is more accurate.

old: The results of this competition were great.
new: The rewards from this competition were great.
reason: Paired translation fix to match corrected definition.

old: He is satisfied with the results of his work.
new: He is satisfied with the rewards of his work.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: Hard work leads to good results.
new: Hard work leads to good rewards.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 我们要守法律。
new: 我们要守规矩。
reason: 守法律 is unnatural Chinese; the standard collocations are 守法 (abide by the law) or 遵守法律. 守规矩 is a natural and common collocation.

old: 这是两国之间的双方合作。
new: 双方经过谈判，达成了合作协议。
reason: Unnatural Chinese: 两国之间的双方合作 is redundant (两国之间 already implies two parties).

old: This is bilateral cooperation between the two countries.
new: After negotiations, both parties reached a cooperation agreement.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 他的文章读起来很顺。
new: 河水顺着山坡流下去。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_2 within same row — both use 顺 to mean 'going smoothly' for an activity.

old: His article reads very smoothly.
new: The river flows smoothly down the hillside.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 他的思维很好。
new: 他的思维非常清晰，分析问题很快。
reason: Tautological: '他的思维很好' does not illustrate the meaning of 思维 at all.

old: His way of thinking is very good.
new: His line of thought is very clear; he analyzes problems quickly.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: to look for something
new: to conduct a search
reason: 搜索 means systematic searching (online search, police search), not casual looking. Row 4475 covers 'to search'; this row should show the systematic/thorough searching sense.

old: 她在图书馆搜索一本旧书。
new: 警察对整栋楼进行了搜索。
reason: Sentence illustrates casual looking rather than systematic searching; also near-duplicate scenario with row 4475 sentence_2.

old: She is looking for an old book in the library.
new: The police conducted a search of the entire building.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 我搜索了整个网站。
new: 救援队在山里进行了大规模的搜索。
reason: Cross-row near-duplicate: row 4475 sentence_1 is '他在网上搜索了答案'; both use online searching scenarios.

old: I looked for it across the entire website.
new: The rescue team conducted a large-scale search in the mountains.
reason: Paired translation fix.

old: 他到处搜索丢失的文件。
new: 海关人员对行李进行了仔细搜索。
reason: Cross-row near-duplicate with row 4473 sentence_1 ('他搜遍了整个房间'); both describe thorough searching for a lost item.

old: He looked everywhere for the lost document.
new: Customs officers conducted a careful search of the luggage.
reason: Paired translation fix.
